notes: Configuration for the crisis fast-path in listen.ts. If ANY keyword pattern matches the visitor's message, the function skips Claude and returns the pre-written crisis card below. Conservative by design — better a false-positive crisis card (easily dismissed) than a false-negative in a true emergency. Review carefully before changing.

response.message: Please stay with someone who can be with you right now. What you are feeling is heavy, and you do not have to carry it alone. Reach out to one of the lines below — they are free, they are confidential, and they will listen.

resources.label: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline (US)
resources.note: Call or text 988 — 24 hours a day

resources.label: Crisis Text Line (US / CA / UK / IE)
International Association for Suicide Prevention
resources.note: Directory of crisis lines by country

resources.label: If you are in immediate danger
resources.note: Call emergency services (911 in the US)

response.closing: If you can, tell one person near you what you are feeling. You matter to God, and you matter here.
